rationale: Review 1's three findings (dupe hb0 derivation, field_simp+show hack at inv_mem' line ~95, and rfl after prod_map at ~301) are real but purely minor stylistic/readability nits in an otherwise automation-heavy proof; no maintainer would require them. Review 2's sound approve therefore produces an equally good merged PR (original code) to any edits from Review 1.
